title: Spicy Crispy Apple Stir-fry
description: A Portuguese-inspired diabetic-friendly spicy and crispy apple stir-fry that's perfect for a solo dinner.

ingredients.name: 1 cup sliced apples
ingredients.notes: Use any sweet variety like Honeycrisp or Fuji

ingredients.name: 1/4 teaspoon red pepper flakes (adjust to taste)
Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
1/4 cup chopped fresh parsley or cilantro (optional)

instructions: Mix apples, onion, garlic, cumin, smoked paprika, red pepper flakes, and unsweetened applesauce in a large bowl.
Sprinkle with salt and pepper. Toss gently to coat evenly.
Transfer the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Bake for 20 minutes or until slightly golden on the sides.
While apples are baking, heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add cooked apple pieces along with baby spinach leaves and a sprinkle of salt and pepper.
Stir-fry for about 5-7 minutes until spinach is wilted and everything is heated through.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro if desired, then serve immediately.
